preview: Canada's high-pressing, possession-based system under their tactical setup will test Morocco's defensive discipline and counter-attacking prowess, with the match hinging on whether the North Africans can exploit spaces on the break against Canada's committed but sometimes exposed fullbacks. Both teams arrive as underdogs with genuine World Cup momentum, making this a genuine 50-50 clash where organizational structure and set-piece execution could prove decisive in determining which side reaches the quarterfinals.
